description: Goal: return facts distinguish missing evidence, produced unknown evidence, no-return control flow, and known semantic type values. Signal: semantic tests prove missing return evidence is not represented as none, underconstrained evidence is not represented as any, and recursive callers may read current ReturnEvidence during convergence while closure/materialization waits for settled evidence. Strategy: replace the ActivationMap return_ty Option<Ty> slot and FactKey::ReturnType contract with ReturnEvidence, update call resolution to consume current return evidence honestly, and keep any and none as domain type values only.
title: Compiler2 semantics: replace ReturnType with ReturnEvidence
